use_cases: Switching between different content panels within a single view without page navigation
Organizing related content into tabbed sections for better information hierarchy
Creating wizard-style multi-step flows with animated transitions
ai_summary: A tabbed navigation component featuring smooth fade and slide animations when switching between content panels. Built with framer-motion for fluid transitions, Radix UI primitives for accessibility, and glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur. Supports customizable tab items and maintains active state with animated content reveals.
